---
title: "Life of John Coleridge Patteson, Missionary Bishop of the Melanesian Islands, The 2 vols"
---

## Life of John Coleridge Patteson, Missionary Bishop of the Melanesian Islands, The 2 vols

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1873
**Genre:** Non-fiction: biography
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
